mcp_tools.name: clickup_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Interface to the ClickUp project management system. Used to read job board tasks, retrieve task details, update task statuses, read comments, and query workspace data.

mcp_tools.name: filesystem_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Local filesystem access for reading and writing job artifacts, execution plans, logs, and intermediate outputs.

mcp_tools.name: memory_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Persistent knowledge graph for storing and retrieving organizational context, past decisions, templates metadata, and agent performance data.

mcp_tools.name: queue_control
mcp_tools.description: Internal job queue management. Provides visibility into pending, active, parked, and completed jobs. Controls job lifecycle transitions.

mcp_tools.name: web_status
mcp_tools.description: Publishes pipeline status to the Erwin OS web dashboard. Allows the orchestrator to update real-time progress indicators visible to human operators.

internal_tools.name: create_run
internal_tools.description: Initialize a new pipeline run for a job. Creates the run context object, sets up artifact directories, and returns a run_id for tracking.

internal_tools.name: dispatch_agent
internal_tools.description: Send a structured handoff payload to a worker agent, triggering its execution. Returns a dispatch receipt with tracking info.

retry_context.description: Included only on retry cycles. Contains repair_notes and previous attempt summary.

internal_tools.name: update_job_status
internal_tools.description: Update the status of a job in both the internal queue and ClickUp. Keeps all systems synchronized.

internal_tools.name: check_queue
internal_tools.description: Inspect the current state of the job queue. Returns counts, next available job, and any parked jobs awaiting input.

internal_tools.name: escalate_to_human
internal_tools.description: Escalate a job to a human operator when automated resolution is not possible. Packages full context including all attempts, artifacts, and the specific blocker.

context_bundle.description: Full job context including all intermediate artifacts and decision log.
